title: alangium barbatum subsp. faberi
intro: Alangium barbatum subsp. faberi, also known as the Chinese alangium, is a plant species in the family Alangiaceae, native to China and Taiwan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alangium barbatum subsp. faberi include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
